positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial forest scene. Giant, stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and interconnected roots forming an abstract glowing network. Hanging geometric moons and star clusters act as overhead canopy elements. The mood is ethereal, dreamlike, and whimsical. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong, complementary contrast between deep indigo blues and glowing neon emerald greens. Flat graphic style with subtle gradient shading and sharp linework, perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. Central composition, symmetrical balance. Highly detailed yet visually clean, scalable, sticker-art aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, messy, grainy, blur, smudge, watermark, signature, text, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, anime, logos, trademarks, celebrity, copyrighted, artist name
